controls.control_objective: To ensure 3, 2000 (notification no
controls.control_description:
20 December 12, 2022 (Updated as on April 15, 2024)

All Authorised Dealer Category - I Banks

Madam / Sir,
Master Direction - Foreign Exchange Management (Hedging of Commodity Price Risk
and Freight Risk in Overseas Markets) Directions, 2022
Attention of Authorised Dealer Category - I (AD Cat-I) banks is invited to Regulation 6 and 6A
of the Foreign Exchange Management (Foreign Exchange Derivative Contracts) Regulations,
2000 dated May 3, 2000 (Notification No.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 3, 2000 (notification no

controls.control_objective: To ensure 3, 2000), as amended from time to time, issued under clause (h) of sub-section (2) of section 47 of foreign exchange management act, 1999 (act 42 of 1
controls.control_description:
25/RB-2000 dated May 3, 2000), as
amended from time to time, issued under clause (h) of sub-section (2) of Section 47 of Foreign
Exchange Management Act, 1999 (Act 42 of 1999) as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 3, 2000), as amended from time to time, issued under clause (h) of sub-section (2) of section 47 of foreign exchange management act, 1999 (act 42 of 1

controls.control_objective: To ensure bring the contents of these directions to the notice of their customers / constituents concerned
controls.control_description:
AD Cat-I
banks may bring the contents of these Directions to the notice of their customers / constituents
concerned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bring the contents of these directions to the notice of their customers / constituents concerned

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the master direction - foreign exchange management (hedging of commodity price risk and freight risk in overseas markets) directions, 2022
controls.control_description:
(i) These Directions shall be called the Master Direction - Foreign Exchange
Management (Hedging of Commodity Price Risk and Freight Risk in Overseas
Markets) Directions, 2022.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the master direction - foreign exchange management (hedging of commodity price risk and freight risk in overseas markets) directions, 2022

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force on december 12, 2022
controls.control_description: (ii) These Directions shall come into force on December 12, 2022.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force on december 12, 2022

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in the section 2(q) of the special economic zones act, 2005
controls.control_description:
(vii) 'International Financial Service Centre' shall have the same meaning as assigned
to it in the Section 2(q) of the Special Economic Zones Act, 2005.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in the section 2(q) of the special economic zones act, 2005

controls.control_objective: To ensure be hedged are:
controls.control_description: Eligible commodities - Commodities whose price risk may be hedged are:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be hedged are:

controls.control_objective: To ensure only be hedged as provided at para 5 (ii) of these directions
controls.control_description:
Price risk of gold may only be hedged as provided at Para 5 (ii)
of these directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only be hedged as provided at para 5 (ii) of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure hedge such exposure in overseas markets using any of the permitted products
controls.control_description:
(i) Eligible entities having exposure to commodity price risk for any eligible commodity
may hedge such exposure in overseas markets using any of the permitted products.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hedge such exposure in overseas markets using any of the permitted products

controls.control_objective: To ensure hedge such exposure in the international financial services centre (ifsc)
controls.control_description:
(ii) Eligible entities having exposure to price risk of gold may hedge such exposure in
the International Financial Services Centre (IFSC), subject to the stipulations set out
in this Master Direction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hedge such exposure in the international financial services centre (ifsc)

controls.control_objective: To ensure hedge such exposure in overseas markets by using any of the permitted products
controls.control_description:
Hedging of freight risk: Eligible entities having exposure to freight risk may hedge
such exposure in overseas markets by using any of the permitted products.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hedge such exposure in overseas markets by using any of the permitted products

controls.control_objective: To ensure permit eligible entities to hedge commodity price risk and freight risk overseas, including ifsc, using permitted products and may remit foreign excha
controls.control_description:
(i) Banks may permit eligible entities to hedge commodity price risk and freight risk
overseas, including IFSC, using permitted products and may remit foreign exchange
in respect of such transactions after satisfying themselves that:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to permit eligible entities to hedge commodity price risk and freight risk overseas, including ifsc, using permitted products and may remit foreign excha

controls.control_objective: To ensure be booked with a bank or with non-bank entities which are permitted to offer such derivatives by their regulators
controls.control_description:
(ii) OTC contracts shall be booked with a bank or with non-bank entities which are
permitted to offer such derivatives by their regulators.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be booked with a bank or with non-bank entities which are permitted to offer such derivatives by their regulators

controls.control_objective: To ensure be specified by fedai
controls.control_description:
For this purpose, a list of
acceptable jurisdictions shall be specified by FEDAI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be specified by fedai

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to eligible entities who are (a) listed on recognized domestic stock exchanges or (b) fully owned subsidiaries of such entities or (c) unlisted entities whose net worth is higher than inr 200 crore
controls.control_description:
(iii) Structured products may be permitted to eligible entities who are (a) listed on
recognized domestic stock exchanges or (b) fully owned subsidiaries of such entities
or (c) unlisted entities whose net worth is higher than INR 200 crore, subject to the
condition that such product are used for the purpose of hedging as defined under these
directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to eligible entities who are (a) listed on recognized domestic stock exchanges or (b) fully owned subsidiaries of such entities or (c) unlisted entities whose net worth is higher than inr 200 crore

controls.control_objective: To ensure be routed through a special account with the bank for this purpose
controls.control_description:
(iv) All payments/receipts related to hedging of exposure to commodity price risk and
freight risk shall be routed through a special account with the bank for this purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be routed through a special account with the bank for this purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep on their records full details of all hedge transactions and related remittances made by the entity
controls.control_description:
(v) Banks shall keep on their records full details of all hedge transactions and related
remittances made by the entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep on their records full details of all hedge transactions and related remittances made by the entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain an annual certificate from the statutory auditors of the entity confirming that the hedge transactions and the margin remittances are in line w
controls.control_description:
(vi) Banks shall obtain an annual certificate from the statutory auditors of the entity
confirming that the hedge transactions and the margin remittances are in line with the
exposure of the entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain an annual certificate from the statutory auditors of the entity confirming that the hedge transactions and the margin remittances are in line w

controls.control_objective: To ensure also comment on the risk management policy of the entity for hedging exposure to commodity price risk and freight risk and the appropriateness of the
controls.control_description:
The statutory auditor shall also comment on the risk
management policy of the entity for hedging exposure to commodity price risk and
freight risk and the appropriateness of the methodology to arrive at the quantum of
these exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to also comment on the risk management policy of the entity for hedging exposure to commodity price risk and freight risk and the appropriateness of the

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake immediate corrective action in case of any irregularity or misuse of these directions
controls.control_description:
(vii) Banks shall undertake immediate corrective action in case of any irregularity or
misuse of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake immediate corrective action in case of any irregularity or misuse of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the chief general manager, financial markets regulation department, reserve bank of india
controls.control_description:
All such cases should be reported to the Chief General
Manager, Financial Markets Regulation Department, Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the chief general manager, financial markets regulation department, reserve bank of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that these sblcs / guarantees are used by their clients for the intended purposes
controls.control_description:
Banks should ensure that these
SBLCs / Guarantees are used by their clients for the intended purposes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that these sblcs / guarantees are used by their clients for the intended purposes

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the provisions of the foreign exchange management (realisation, repatriation and surrender of foreign exchange) regulations, 2015
controls.control_description:
Realisation and repatriation of foreign exchange: Realisation and repatriation of
foreign exchange due or accruing to an eligible entity resulting from permitted
transactions under this direction shall be guided by the provisions of the Foreign
Exchange Management (Realisation, repatriation and surrender of foreign exchange)
Regulations, 2015.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the provisions of the foreign exchange management (realisation, repatriation and surrender of foreign exchange) regulations, 2015

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a quarterly report to the chief general manager, financial markets regulation department, reserve bank of india through centralised information
controls.control_description:
Report to Reserve Bank: Banks shall submit a quarterly report to the Chief
General Manager, Financial Markets Regulation Department, Reserve Bank of India
through Centralised Information Management System (CIMS) in the format provided
in Annexure I by the 15th of the month following the end of the quarter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a quarterly report to the chief general manager, financial markets regulation department, reserve bank of india through centralised information

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted by the bank
controls.control_description:
In case of no
transactions, a "Nil" report shall be submitted by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted by the bank
